metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code skills, packaged as installable plugins. Add the marketplace once, then install individual skills on demand.

plugins.name: drawio-figure-iterate
plugins.description: Author print-legible draw.io figures through a generate -> export -> read -> score -> fix loop. Bundles the iterate skill, a headless-export wrapper, a PIL-metrics generator, and an optional draw.io MCP server.

plugins.name: md-to-docx-pdf
plugins.description: Render Markdown to a styled DOCX and PDF (PDF via LibreOffice headless): title page, inline formatting, content-weighted auto-width tables, lists, code, embedded images. Single- or multi-document builds.

plugins.name: codex-adversarial-review
plugins.description: A two-round methodology for stress-testing prose, claims, or code with an adversarial second model (Codex): brief with attack vectors, synthesise adopt/reject/pushback, re-attack and rule on pushbacks.
